title: Youtube Poop: Ian Benardo is Rubbish
description:
Ian Benardo thinks he's the next American Idol, but he fails at singing and opening doors.  Enjoy! :)


((Note: This is also my entry for YouChewPoop's Perfect Poop Contest!  Be sure to check it out at this link: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bc5smuEjQk0 ))
